    • Field Detail

      • RoomNumber

        public java.lang.String RoomNumber
        The room number.

        Attribute: n...25

      • FolioNumber

        public java.lang.String FolioNumber
        The folio number. This is the bill/invoice number.

        Attribute: n...15

      • RoomRates

        public java.util.List<PaymentRequest.LodgingInfo.RoomRates> RoomRates
        List of PaymentRequest.LodgingInfo.RoomRates.

      • ChargeType

        public java.lang.String ChargeType
        The primary charge type for the transaction.

        0: Other
        1: Lodging/Hotel
        2: Restaurant
        3: Gift Shop
        4: Spa
        5: Beauty Services
        6: Convention Fee
        7: Tennis
        8: Golf

        Attribute: n1

      • NoShowFlag

        public java.lang.String NoShowFlag
        No-show Indicator.

        0: Guest did not show up for the reservation.
        1: Guest did show for the reservation.

        Attribute: n1

      • CheckInDate

        public java.lang.String CheckInDate
        The time and date of check-in. Format: YYYYMMDDhhmmss.

        Attribute: n...14

      • CheckOutDate

        public java.lang.String CheckOutDate
        The time and date of check-out. Format: YYYYMMDDhhmmss.

        Attribute: n...14

      • SpecialProgramCode

        public java.lang.String SpecialProgramCode
        Special Program Code.

        0: Other/No Code
        1: Assured Reservation/Normal Charge/Purchase
        2: Delayed Charge
        3: Advanced Deposit
        4: Express Check-out Service

        Attribute: n...2

      • DepartureAdjustedAmount

        public java.lang.String DepartureAdjustedAmount
        Departure adjusted amount. Format $$$$$$CC

        Attribute: n...8

      • LodgingItems

        public java.util.List<PaymentRequest.LodgingInfo.LodgingItem> LodgingItems
        List of PaymentRequest.LodgingInfo.LodgingItem.
